title: Record in original language; English translation
doc_html:
Art. 1307.13. Record in original language; English translation

            A record filed with a tribunal of this state under this Section must be in the original language and, if not in English, must be accompanied by an English translation.

            Acts 2015, No. 80, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
doc_text:
Art. 1307.13.  Record in original language; English translation
A record filed with a tribunal of this state under this Section must be in the original
language and, if not in English, must be accompanied by an English translation.
Acts 2015, No. 80, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
